title: Un allegato PDF non viene visualizzato
creator: dibarileonardo1
content:
Una mail in particolare proveniente da "noreply.passaportonline@poliziadistato.it" non mostra la presenza di un allegato PDF. L'allegato sembra presente nel corpo della mail e questo di seguito é il suo header:

Content-Type: application/pdf; name="Dichiarazione.pdf" Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="Dichiarazione.pdf" Content-Description: Dichiarazione.pdf

E' un vecchio problema che sembrava risolto già dalle versioni 9 e 11 ma pare si ripresenti nell'ultima versione 151.0

title: Thunderbird desktop switched to ESR release erroneously. Why?
creator: moz.defender447
content:
My reddit post is here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Thunderbird/s/lM11YcRIIT

Hello,

I'm confused and slightly concerned.

Through no deliberate action by me, Thunderbird DOWNGRADED itself from the May 2026 standard release version to an AUGUST 2025 ESR(Extended Support Release) version.

UPDATE: the next application restart brought the ESR version up to date, but why was I forced onto the ESR version?!

What could have pissibly triggered this? I don't want or need ESR, and without knowing the cause, I have e no guarantee it won't happen again. Worst if all, everywhere I look, there is zero explanation for this. It appears to be fairly unprecedented.

My original installer for 102.15.1 was downloaded from the official Thunderbird site in 2025.

The sequence of events:

  • I've had Thunderbird version 102.15.1 installed for awhile, but wasn't using it.
  • Ysterday I opened it and connected an account.
  • Today I noticed it hadn't auto-updated, so I went into the settings and clicked on the 'check for updates'.
  • this brought it up to v115.10.1.
  • Its success was demonstrated by me being sent to this URL after it opened: https://www.thunderbird.net/en-US/thu.../?locale=en-US&version=115.10.1&channel=release&oldversion=102.15.1(https://www.thunderbird.net/en-US/thunderbird/115.0/whatsnew/?locale=en-US&version=115.10.1&channel=release&oldversion=102.15.1)
  • An hour later, I closed Thunderbird completely hoping it would fix a sync that appeared 'stuck'.
  • When I re-opened Thunderbird, I saw the small "updating" window. It was pretty surprising since I had *just* updated.
  • After Thunderbird opens, after this additional "update", the URL that I'm sent to is this: https://www.thunderbird.net/en-US/thu.../?locale=en-US&version=128.14.0&channel=esr&oldversion=115.18.0(https://www.thunderbird.net/en-US/thunderbird/128.0/whatsnew/?locale=en-US&version=128.14.0&channel=esr&oldversion=115.18.0)
  • Thunderbird changed to a year old ESR version!
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36;tb_version:115.10.1;os:Windows 11;solver_id:7671979
